hooks.command: cd /home/lane/Dev/tutti-belli && output=$(pnpm check 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then printf "%s" "$output" | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("pnpm check failed:\n" + .)}}'; exit 2; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"pnpm check: no type errors"}}'; fi

cd /home/lane/Dev/tutti-belli && output=$(pnpm lint 2>&1); exit_code=$?; if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then printf "%s" "$output" | jq -Rs '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":("pnpm lint failed:\n" + .)}}'; exit 2; else echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"pnpm lint: no issues"}}'; fi
